description: You are a merchandise displayer preparing a floor plan for a retail display area. Create a LibreCAD drawing on a layer named 'FIXTURES'. Define a block named 'DISPLAY_FIXTURE' containing a 1200x800 rectangle with its bottom-left corner at (0,0) and a circle with radius 100 centered at (600, 400). Insert 6 instances of the 'DISPLAY_FIXTURE' block on the 'FIXTURES' layer in a 3-column by 2-row grid starting at (1000, 1000) with horizontal spacing of 2500 units and vertical spacing of 2000 units. Use scale 1:1 and rotation 0°. Save the drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/store_layout.dxf.
